rooms.description: Cold. The first thing you feel is cold. Then the beeping. A heart monitor, disconnected, cries out in three-second intervals. Emily stands beside the bed, pale and exhausted.

npcs.name: emily
npcs.description: A tired nurse in bloodstained scrubs, trying to hold herself together.

dialogues.text: Emily looks exhausted, but relieved that you are awake. "The terminal in the research room may still have security access, but it needs power. If we can get the generator running, we might still have a chance. And if you see Dr. Zaun... don't listen to him."

rooms.description: A ruined central lobby with overturned furniture, shattered monitors, and dried blood across the tiles. The north corridor remains sealed behind a reinforced security door.

enemies.name: zombified human
enemies.description: A staggering infected drags one leg behind it, murmuring fragments of a forgotten sentence.

rooms.description: A damaged research lab filled with cracked terminals, scattered papers and overturned storage trays. A blind clicker stands near the far wall, listening.

enemies.name: clicker
enemies.description: A blind creature stands motionless near the examination table, clicking softly into the darkness.

interactables.name: terminal
interactables.description: A security terminal with a cracked but still functional display.
interactables.successMessage: The terminal flickers to life. ACCESS CODE REQUIRED.

npcs.name: emily
npcs.description: Emily searches the ruined lab for anything still usable.

dialogues.text: Emily keeps her voice low. "If Zaun locked the north wing, the terminal should tell us why. I found references to override protocols in the research records. Check every note carefully."
Emily reads the glowing terminal screen and goes pale. "So it was true... NV-1 wasn't an accident. Zaun built this. If that door is open now, then he's waiting for you."

rooms.description: A dark generator room filled with diesel fumes, hot metal, and broken machinery. Sparks hiss from an open control panel while something growls in the dark.

enemies.name: ripper
enemies.description: A hunched, doglike infected prowls near the generator, claws scraping on the concrete floor.

interactables.name: generator
interactables.description: A damaged backup generator connected to the facility power grid.
interactables.successMessage: You pour the fuel into the generator and restart the system. The lights flicker back to life.
interactables.failureMessage: The generator won't start without fuel.

rooms.description: A sealed laboratory lined with cracked containment chambers. In the center stands Dr. Zaun, illuminated by the amber glow of a massive tank.

npcs.name: zaun
npcs.description: Dr. Zaun stands before the containment tank, calm and unreadable.

dialogues.text: Dr. Zaun steps forward, smiling faintly. "You finally made it. You think this place is a tomb, but it is only the cradle of what comes next."
Zaun watches you silently through the chaos, as if studying the result of an experiment.
"So... you survived them all. Now make your choice."

rooms.description: A narrow emergency escape corridor ending in a reinforced fire escape hatch. Beyond it lies the ruined city.

interactables.name: fire escape
interactables.description: A locked emergency hatch leading outside.
interactables.successMessage: You swipe the keycard. The hatch unlocks with a metallic clang. Fresh air rushes in. You and Emily disappear into the ruined city. ENDING: SURVIVAL
interactables.failureMessage: The hatch is locked. A keycard reader blinks red beside the handle.

items.name: notebook
items.description: The notebook is written in your own handwriting. One line is underlined twice: 'Find the truth. Trust no one. Especially not Dr. Zaun.' In the margin you see half of a code: 73.

items.name: flashlight
items.description: A heavy-duty flashlight. The battery is weak, but the beam is still sharp enough to disorient something in the dark.

items.name: bandages
items.description: A bundle of clean bandages taken from the exam room supply cart.

items.name: research notes
items.description: The notes describe NV-1 as an unstable neuro-regenerative therapy. A stamped page references terminal override access. At the bottom of the page, half a code is scribbled in red ink: 14.

items.name: fuel canister
items.description: A heavy canister of emergency diesel fuel. It should be enough to restart the backup generator.

items.name: scrap metal
items.description: A jagged strip of bent steel. Crude, but heavy enough to use as an improvised weapon.

items.name: broken bottle
items.description: A shattered laboratory bottle with a sharp glass neck. Desperate, but better than empty hands.

items.name: keycard
items.description: A high-level security keycard bearing Dr. Zaun's clearance mark.

zaun_phases.message: Zaun releases the first wave. Three zombified humans stagger out from shattered containment chambers.
Another containment line opens. Two clickers emerge, heads twitching toward the slightest sound.
Metal locks snap open around the chamber. A pack of rippers bursts from the lower cages.
